title: psacalium goldsmithii
intro: Psacalium goldsmithii, also known as the Tree Marigold or Mexican Gold, is a plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its bitter compounds, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Psacalium goldsmithii include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for diabetes and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Psacalium goldsmithii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
